t.script: tailwind.config = { darkMode: "class", corePlugins: { preflight: false }, theme: { extend: { colors: { "primary": "#784e83", "secondary": "#3b6564", "tertiary": "#755b00", "primary-container": "#93669d", "secondary-container": "#beebe9", "tertiary-container": "#ffe08f", "on-primary": "#ffffff", "on-secondary": "#ffffff", "on-tertiary": "#ffffff", "on-primary-container": "#ffffff", "on-secondary-container": "#416c6a", "on-tertiary-container": "#503d00", "background": "#fbf9f8", "surface": "#fbf9f8", "surface-container": "#efeded", "surface-container-low": "#f5f3f3", "surface-container-high": "#e9e8e7", "surface-container-highest": "#e4e2e2", "on-surface": "#1b1c1c", "on-surface-variant": "#4d444d", "outline": "#7e747e", "outline-variant": "#d0c3ce", }, fontFamily: { "headline": ["Plus Jakarta Sans"], "body": ["Be Vietnam Pro"], "label": ["Plus Jakarta Sans"] }, borderRadius: {"DEFAULT": "1rem", "lg": "2rem", "xl": "3rem", "full": "9999px"}, }, }, }

span.class: w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-primary text-on-primary flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold shadow-lg shadow-primary/20
w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-surface-container-highest text-on-surface-variant flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold
w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-surface-container-highest text-on-surface-variant flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold

div.class: absolute -inset-4 bg-primary/5 rounded-xl blur-3xl group-hover:bg-primary/10 transition-all
relative arch-mask overflow-hidden aspect-[4/5] bg-surface-container-high shadow-xl shadow-on-surface/5

img.class: w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-700 group-hover:scale-105

span.class: px-3 py-1 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container rounded-full text-xs font-bold font-label uppercase tracking-widest

h1.class: text-4xl font-headline font-black text-on-surface tracking-tight leading-tight

div.p: Includes 4 carbon-fiber paddles, 12 pro-grade balls, and a portable net system for the ultimate Bahraini weekend matches.

div.class: glass-card rounded-lg p-8 shadow-2xl shadow-primary/5 border border-white/50

div.p: Rentals are calculated in 24-hour blocks from your pickup time.

label.class: block font-label text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-primary

span.class: text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full border border-gray-100 uppercase tracking-tighter

div.class: bg-surface-container-low p-6 rounded-3xl border border-outline-variant/15 flex flex-col space-y-4 hover:border-primary/40 transition-all group shadow-sm
w-12 h-12 bg-primary/10 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-primary

p.class: text-xs text-on-surface-variant font-bold uppercase tracking-widest mb-1 opacity-60

input.name: start_date
input.class: w-full bg-transparent border-none p-0 text-2xl font-black font-headline focus:ring-0 text-on-surface

div.class: flex items-center justify-between p-6 rounded-3xl bg-primary/5 border border-primary/10 transition-all hover:bg-primary/10 cursor-pointer
w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary flex items-center justify-center text-on-primary

input.name: want_more_time
input.class: w-6 h-6 rounded-lg text-primary focus:ring-primary border-outline-variant transition-all

div.class: flex items-center space-x-3 bg-white p-2 rounded-full border border-outline-variant/30

button.class: w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 hover:text-primary transition-colors border-none

input.name: duration_extra
input.class: w-12 text-center font-black border-none focus:ring-0 p-0 m-0

button.class: w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 hover:text-primary transition-colors border-none

label.class: block font-label text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-secondary

span.class: text-[10px] bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-black uppercase tracking-tighter shadow-sm

div.class: bg-surface-container-high/50 p-6 rounded-3xl border border-secondary/15 flex flex-col space-y-4 hover:border-secondary/40 transition-all shadow-inner
w-12 h-12 bg-secondary/10 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-secondary

p.class: text-xs text-on-surface-variant font-bold uppercase tracking-widest mb-1 opacity-60

div.class: text-2xl font-black font-headline text-secondary opacity-50 italic

button.class: w-full py-5 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-primary-container text-on-primary font-headline font-bold text-lg flex items-center justify-center space-x-3 shadow-xl shadow-primary/30 transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] border-none

div.class: flex items-center space-x-4 bg-white p-4 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100

a.class: bg-primary text-white p-4 rounded-xl hover:scale-105 transition-all

div.class: glass-card p-6 rounded-3xl border border-white/50 shadow-lg product-card transition-all flex flex-col h-full

t.t-esc: product.description_sale or 'Full bundled experience for high-stakes play.'

button.class: add-to-cart-btn bg-white border-2 border-primary text-primary px-6 py-2 rounded-full font-bold hover:bg-primary hover:text-white transition-all flex-grow
add-to-wishlist-btn w-10 h-10 bg-white border-2 border-gray-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500 transition-all

div.class: bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm product-card transition-all

p.class: text-xs text-gray-400 mb-4 font-medium uppercase tracking-tighter

button.class: add-to-wishlist-btn w-8 h-8 bg-gray-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500 transition-all
add-to-cart-btn w-10 h-10 bg-gray-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-secondary hover:bg-secondary hover:text-white transition-all

div.class: fixed bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-full max-w-md px-6

a.class: w-full py-5 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-[#93669d] text-white font-bold text-center block shadow-2xl scale-100 hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-all

div.class: oe_structure h-[80vh] flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-900
max-w-xl w-full p-12 bg-gray-800 rounded-3xl shadow-2xl text-white border border-gray-700

h2.class: text-3xl font-bold mb-6 text-center text-blue-400 uppercase

div.p: "Excellence is a habit. Help us maintain our standards."

textarea.name: comment
textarea.class: w-full bg-gray-700 border-0 p-6 rounded-2xl text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 placeholder-gray-500
textarea.placeholder: Tell us about the equipment performance...

button.class: w-full bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 py-4 rounded-xl font-bold uppercase tracking-widest transition-all

div.class: oe_structure flex items-center justify-center h-[80vh] bg-black

div.p: Your feedback has been logged in the WANNA PLAY QMS audit trail. We value your strategic partnership.

a.class: inline-block mt-8 text-blue-400 border-b border-blue-400 pb-2 hover:text-white hover:border-white transition-all uppercase text-sm font-bold

span.class: text-xs font-bold text-primary uppercase tracking-widest bg-primary/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-primary/10
